mapper.sql: s.section_id, c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, term.term_id, term.term_name, s.weekday, s.start_section, s.end_section, s.classroom, s.week_range
mapper.select: select student_id, user_id, student_no, student_name, college_name, major_name, class_name, grade from campus_student where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' limit 1
select student_id from campus_student where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' limit 1
select teacher_id, user_id, teacher_no, teacher_name, college_name, title from campus_teacher where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' limit 1

select , null as student_count from campus_student_course sc inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = sc.student_id inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = sc.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where stu.user_id = #{userId} and sc.status = '0' and term.current_flag = 'Y' order by s.weekday, s.start_section, c.course_name

select , null as student_count from campus_student_course sc inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = sc.student_id inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = sc.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where stu.user_id = #{userId} and sc.status = '0' and term.current_flag = 'Y' order by s.weekday, s.start_section

select score.score_id, score.section_id, c.course_name, term.term_name, c.credit, score.score, score.grade_point, score.exam_type from campus_score score inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = score.student_id inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = score.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where stu.user_id = #{userId} order by term.start_date desc, c.course_name

select e.exam_id, e.section_id, c.course_name, t.teacher_name, term.term_name, e.exam_time, e.classroom, e.seat_no, e.exam_type from campus_exam e inner join campus_student_course sc on sc.section_id = e.section_id inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = sc.student_id inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = e.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where stu.user_id = #{userId} and sc.status = '0' order by e.exam_time

select , count(sc.student_id) as student_count from campus_course_section s inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id left join campus_student_course sc on sc.section_id = s.section_id and sc.status = '0' left join campus_student stu on stu.user_id = #{userId} and stu.status = '0' left join campus_student_course mine on mine.student_id = stu.student_id and mine.section_id = s.section_id and mine.status = '0' where term.current_flag = 'Y' and c.status = '0' and mine.section_id is null group by s.section_id, c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, term.term_id, term.term_name, s.weekday, s.start_section, s.end_section, s.classroom, s.week_range order by s.weekday, s.start_section, c.course_name

select count(1) from campus_course_section s inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where s.section_id = #{sectionId} and c.status = '0' and term.current_flag = 'Y'

select count(1) from campus_student_course sc inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = sc.student_id inner join campus_course_section selected on selected.section_id = sc.section_id inner join campus_course_section target on target.section_id = #{sectionId} where stu.user_id = #{userId} and sc.status = '0' and selected.weekday = target.weekday and selected.start_section <= target.end_section and selected.end_section >= target.start_section
mapper.insert: insert into campus_student_course(student_id, section_id, status) values(#{studentId}, #{sectionId}, '0') on duplicate key update status = '0'
mapper.select: select , count(sc.student_id) as student_count from campus_course_section s inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id left join campus_student_course sc on sc.section_id = s.section_id and sc.status = '0' where t.user_id = #{userId} and term.current_flag = 'Y' group by s.section_id, c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, term.term_id, term.term_name, s.weekday, s.start_section, s.end_section, s.classroom, s.week_range order by s.weekday, s.start_section, c.course_name

select , count(sc.student_id) as student_count from campus_course_section s inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id left join campus_student_course sc on sc.section_id = s.section_id and sc.status = '0' where t.user_id = #{userId} and term.current_flag = 'Y' group by s.section_id, c.course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, term.term_id, term.term_name, s.weekday, s.start_section, s.end_section, s.classroom, s.week_range order by s.weekday, s.start_section

select e.exam_id, e.section_id, c.course_name, t.teacher_name, term.term_name, e.exam_time, e.classroom, e.seat_no, e.exam_type from campus_exam e inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = e.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where t.user_id = #{userId} order by e.exam_time

select score.score_id, stu.student_id, stu.student_no, stu.student_name, s.section_id, c.course_name, term.term_name, c.credit, score.score, score.grade_point, coalesce(score.exam_type, '期末') as exam_type from campus_student_course sc inner join campus_student stu on stu.student_id = sc.student_id inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = sc.section_id inner join campus_course c on c.course_id = s.course_id inner join campus_teacher t on t.teacher_id = s.teacher_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id left join campus_score score on score.student_id = stu.student_id and score.section_id = s.section_id where t.user_id = #{userId} and s.section_id = #{sectionId} and sc.status = '0' order by stu.student_no
mapper.insert: insert into campus_score(student_id, section_id, score, grade_point, exam_type) values(#{studentId}, #{sectionId}, #{score}, #{gradePoint}, #{examType})
